A.evidence: Prose faithful across visible pages with markdown heading hierarchy (## Hardware/2.1 Wheels); a_decel formula correct LaTeX; but Fig 3/4 captions clustered out of order and Fig 2 (a)/(b) subcaptions dropped.

B.evidence: Cleanest prose with proper superscripts, curly quotes and en-dashes; best math (a_decel and Kalman \hat{x} in correct LaTeX); but headings lost markdown markup (plain '1 Introduction','2 Hardware') and Fig 2-7 captions/image placeholders omitted entirely.

C.evidence: Faithful text with sup superscripts and preserved cross-reference links; correct a_decel formula; best figure-caption reading order (Fig 2 (a)/(b), Fig 3, Fig 5 (a)(b)(c)); minor nit: contact URL mangled 'https://delftmercurians](...).nl/' and running headers inlined as headings.

D.evidence: Dropped the a_decel equation ('<!-- formula-not-decoded -->') and dumped Figure 8 plot axis tick labels as garbled numeric prose ('Position (m) 4.0 3.5...'); superscripts flattened to plain '1', URL spaced 'nl/', and running headers injected as bullets ('- 2 The Delft Mercurians').
